slides.title: Mobility = *depth*
slides.body: Tight hips and ankles wreck your squat.

slides.title: A little *daily*
slides.body: 5 to 10 minutes a day beats one long session.

slides.title: Open your *hips*
slides.body: Most lifters are locked up from sitting.

slides.title: Stretch *after*
slides.body: Save the long stretches for post-workout.

slides.title: Move *better*.
slides.body: Vibe Health keeps your training and recovery on track.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store
